product_category.description: Category or product type being advertised (e.g., 'sales enablement software', 'B2B data API').

target_audience.description: Description of the ideal buyer persona and company profile.

monthly_budget.description: Total monthly Google Ads budget in USD.

existing_conversion_data.description: Whether the account already has 30+ conversions/month from prior campaigns.

primary_keywords.description: Seed keywords provided by the user to anchor ad group themes.

competitor_names.description: Competitor brand names to consider for competitor ad groups or negatives.

landing_page_url.description: Primary destination URL for the conversion-focused ad groups.
